user.title: Ksenia Lares 4.0 Gateway
user.description: Enter the URL of your Ksenia Lares 4.0 control panel, the username (optional, for display purposes) and the PIN of the user that will be used by Home Assistant to interact with the panel.

data_description.pin: PIN code assigned to the Home Assistant user on the panel

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Ksenia Lares 4.0
reauth_confirm.description: The panel rejected the current credentials. Re-enter the PIN to continue.

error.invalid_url: The provided URL is not valid.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the panel. Check the URL, SSL settings and network access.
error.timeout: Connected to the panel but it did not return the initial snapshot in time.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while talking to the panel.

abort.already_configured: This Ksenia Lares 4.0 panel is already configured.
